# Feature: Shared Confirmation Dialog Hook

## 1. Feature Goal

**ID**: FEAT-001  
**Source Plan**: `.spec-lite/plan_pane_actions.md`

Create a reusable confirmation-dialog primitive in `packages/core` so destructive actions across pane UIs can share one consistent interaction model (same layout, same red confirm action, same cancel affordance, same async-confirm behavior) instead of duplicating local dialog state and markup in each component.

This feature establishes the foundation used by FEAT-002 through FEAT-005 (Collections/Test Lab/Flows/Environments delete confirmations).

---

## 2. Data Model (Granular)

`.spec-lite/data_model.md` does not exist. This feature adds **UI-only, in-memory state models** (no persistence, no backend schema, no adapter contract changes).

### Entities & Attributes

- **`ConfirmDialogOptions`** (hook input object)
  - `title` (string) - dialog title text; required.
  - `message` (string) - dialog body text; required.
  - `onConfirm` (`() => void | Promise<void>`) - callback executed when confirm is clicked; required.
  - `confirmText` (string, optional) - confirm button label; defaults to `Confirm`.
  - `cancelText` (string, optional) - cancel button label; defaults to `Cancel`.

- **`ConfirmDialogState`** (hook internal state)
  - `isOpen` (boolean) - controls dialog visibility.
  - `isConfirming` (boolean) - true while async `onConfirm` is pending.
  - `options` (`ConfirmDialogOptions | null`) - currently active dialog payload.

### Relationships

- `useConfirmDialog` owns one `ConfirmDialogState` instance and projects it into a `ConfirmDialogComponent` renderer.
- `ConfirmDialogComponent` reads `ConfirmDialogState` and invokes callbacks (`onCancel`, `onConfirm`) exposed by the hook.

### Indexes & Constraints

- N/A (no storage/indexing).
- Runtime constraint: `openConfirmDialog` must only open with complete required options (`title`, `message`, `onConfirm`).

---

## 3. Files

List of files this feature is expected to create or modify:

- `packages/core/src/hooks/useConfirmDialog.tsx` - New reusable hook for open/close/confirm lifecycle.
- `packages/core/src/components/common/ConfirmDialog.tsx` - New shared presentational confirmation dialog.
- `packages/core/src/index.ts` - Export `useConfirmDialog` (and `ConfirmDialog` if the component is intended for direct reuse).
- `packages/core/src/components/common/ValidationStoreGrid.tsx` - Adopt the new hook as a reference migration to prove parity with existing dialog UX.
- `packages/core/src/test/hooks/useConfirmDialog.test.tsx` - Hook lifecycle unit tests.
- `packages/core/src/test/components/common/ConfirmDialog.test.tsx` - Component rendering and interaction tests.
- `packages/core/src/test/components/common/ValidationStoreGrid.test.tsx` - Regression test for migrated delete confirmation behavior.
- `packages/core/README.md` - Document the shared confirmation hook usage pattern for future pane feature work.

---

## 4. Dependencies

- **Upstream dependencies**: None.
- **Downstream dependents**:
  - FEAT-002 (Collections pane actions)
  - FEAT-003 (Test Lab pane actions)
  - FEAT-004 (Flows pane actions)
  - FEAT-005 (Environments pane actions)

These features should consume this hook instead of introducing local confirmation-dialog state.

---

## 5. Implementation Tasks

### TASK-001: Build shared `ConfirmDialog` presentational component

- [ ] **Implementation**: Create `packages/core/src/components/common/ConfirmDialog.tsx` with a typed prop interface and the standardized dialog structure (`Dialog`, `DialogContent`, `DialogHeader`, `DialogTitle`, `DialogDescription`, `DialogFooter`, `SecondaryButton`, `PrimaryButton`, `XIcon`, `CheckIcon`). Include support for `isOpen`, `isConfirming`, `title`, `message`, `confirmText`, `cancelText`, `onCancel`, and `onConfirm`.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Add `packages/core/src/test/components/common/ConfirmDialog.test.tsx` to verify: hidden when closed, renders title/message when open, cancel invokes `onCancel`, confirm invokes `onConfirm`, buttons are disabled while `isConfirming`.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Add JSDoc to `ConfirmDialogProps` and component export explaining expected usage and async-confirm UI behavior.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/core test -- ConfirmDialog` and confirm all new dialog component tests pass.

### TASK-002: Build `useConfirmDialog` hook with async-confirm lifecycle

- [ ] **Implementation**: Create `packages/core/src/hooks/useConfirmDialog.tsx` with the API defined in the plan (`openConfirmDialog`, `ConfirmDialogComponent`) and internal state (`isOpen`, `isConfirming`, current options). Confirm handler must support `Promise` callbacks by toggling `isConfirming` during await and auto-closing only after successful completion.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Add `packages/core/src/test/hooks/useConfirmDialog.test.tsx` for open/close lifecycle, synchronous confirm callback, asynchronous confirm callback, and rejection path (dialog remains open for caller-controlled error handling).
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Add comprehensive hook JSDoc including `@example` showing how a pane action opens the dialog and provides a delete callback.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/core test -- useConfirmDialog` and confirm lifecycle tests pass.
- **Depends on**: TASK-001.

### TASK-003: Export and reference-adopt the hook in one existing consumer

- [ ] **Implementation**: Export the hook from `packages/core/src/index.ts`. Migrate `packages/core/src/components/common/ValidationStoreGrid.tsx` from inline `confirmDialog` state + inline dialog JSX to `useConfirmDialog`, preserving existing copy, iconography, and button color themes.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Add `packages/core/src/test/components/common/ValidationStoreGrid.test.tsx` coverage for delete flow: clicking delete opens the confirmation dialog, cancel closes without removal, confirm triggers rule removal.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Update `packages/core/README.md` with a short “Shared confirmation dialog” section that demonstrates importing and using `useConfirmDialog`.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/core test -- ValidationStoreGrid` and manually validate in UI that dialog text/buttons match pre-refactor behavior.
- **Depends on**: TASK-002.

---

## 6. Cross-Cutting Concerns

- **Auth**: N/A.
- **Error Handling**: The hook follows Result/error conventions indirectly by not swallowing business errors from delete handlers; async failures should leave the dialog open so caller code can surface notifications via `notification.showNotification('error', message)`.
- **Logging**: No new logging path required. Existing action handlers remain responsible for operation-failure logging with context.

---

- [x] TASK-002: Build `useConfirmDialog` hook with async-confirm lifecycle
